name: USDT
nextSteps: Upload config/solana-token-metadata.generated.json to IPFS; update on-chain URI if needed.
Create TOKEN/USDC pool on https://raydium.io/liquidity/create/ (or Orca / Meteora).
Add liquidity (recommended $500+ USDC side) so Jupiter indexes a USD price.
Import mint in MetaMask: Solana account → Import token → paste mint address.
Price may take 15 min – 2 h after the pool is live.
